source_pr.title: executor: fix time filter condition when select from information.slow_query_log
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #34320

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Such kind of requests can't get the correct result, the time filter condition doesnt work and the query scan the whole table. 

```
select count(digest) from information.slow_query where time > xxx
select digest, count(1) from information.slow_query group by digest order by count(1)
```

That's because when the slow query MemTable's output column doesn't contain 'time' column, it will not decode the 'time' column, thus ignore the 'time' filter condition.

When 'time' column is not in the output column, `e.columnValueFactoryMap[field]` is nil when `field` is `variable.SlowLogTimeStr`.
I add an extra check to decode the 'time' column and check the time filter condition in these cases.


### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: SELECT original_sql, bind_sql, default_db, status, create_time, update_time, charset, collation, source FROM mysql.bind_info WHERE update_time > '0000-00-00 00:00:00' ORDER BY update_time, create_time; (executor/slow_query_sql_test.go)
failure_signature: SELECT original_sql, bind_sql, default_db, status, create_time, update_time, charset, collation, source FROM mysql.bind_info WHERE update_time > '0000-00-00 00:00:00' ORDER BY update_time, create_time; (executor/slow_query_sql_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: SELECT original_sql, bind_sql, default_db, status, create_time, update_time, charset, collation, source FROM mysql.bind_info WHERE update_time > '0000-00-00 00:00:00' ORDER BY update_time, create_time; (executor/slow_query_sql_test.go)
